attacking_style: Aggressive long-range breakaway specialist who targets early moves, prioritizing both KOM and intermediate sprint points to dominate multiple classifications from the front.
team_tactics: Appears to operate with freedom for opportunistic breakaway hunting rather than structured team support; autonomous stage-hunting role.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with multiple categorized climbs where KOM points are available; thrives in breakaways on routes with both climbing and sprint intermediate opportunities.
vulnerability: Single race data insufficient to identify clear vulnerabilities; likely struggles when race stays controlled or when pure climbers contest KOMs.
key_patterns: Dominates breakaway competitions by targeting multiple objectives (KOM, sprints) simultaneously.
Early-race aggression to establish breakaway position before selective terrain begins.
Stage hunting approach focused on points classifications rather than stage win alone.
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated strong early Giro form with breakaway dominance, suggesting readiness for stage opportunities
